name: Context Visualizer Dashboard
note: Shows one badge per prompt slot with a bar chart of its character count. Each colon = ~1000 chars (~250 tokens). Click any badge to refresh.

rules.name: Context Visualizer Dashboard
rules.note: Step 1 — snapshot non-history slots as TSV rows. Step 2 — find the longest label so all bars align. Step 3 — render each slot as a padded bar, then append a summed Chat History row.

actions.note: Produces lines like: CNZ RAG<TAB>51200 — display name from preset, char count. Excludes chatHistory-N turns and the legacy newMainChat slot.
Length of the longest slot display name (excluding history). Used to align bar chart columns.

Each line becomes one badge chip. Labels padded to name_pad chars so bars align. Each colon ~1000 chars (~250 tokens). Max 40 colons covers ~10k tokens before overflow. Chat History aggregates all chatHistory-N turns plus the legacy newMainChat slot.
